label: code-polish-fixes

fixes_applied.label: parse_pause_timeout() case-insensitive unit tokens
fixes_applied.detail: Regex now accepts mixed-case units (Hours, Days, etc.) via [Hh][Oo]... character classes; unit_lower=$(tr [:upper:] [:lower:]) before case switch

fixes_applied.label: BSD/macOS date -d portability in pause-detection block
fixes_applied.detail: Added _iso_to_epoch_crossplatform() helper: tries python3 first (universally available), falls back to GNU date -d. Eliminates premature aborted_by_system on BSD/macOS hosts.

fixes_applied.label: Webhook_URL vs WEBHOOK_URL casing documentation clarification
fixes_applied.detail: Added variable-naming convention note in Curl Pattern section explaining Webhook_URL (config-key casing, heredoc curl) vs WEBHOOK_URL (uppercase, jq-pipe curl) are the same config value; warns maintainers to update both.

fixes_applied.label: sanitize_block_reason() LOWER-VAR bare-lowercase anchor
fixes_applied.detail: The LOWER-VAR sed pattern at line 270 already uses (^|[[:space:]]) anchor with \1 capture-group preservation as of cycle-1. No code change needed; fix was applied in v6.9.0-cycle-1 (Phase 8 Scenario 4). Carry-over roadmap item confirmed resolved.

fixes_applied.label: h-snippet-citation-marker-format.sh test scope
fixes_applied.detail: Assertions 3 and 4 now grep skills/ + core/ only (not $REPO_ROOT). Expected counts updated to actual post-cycle-1 values: webhook-curl=29, issue-id-validation=5, metrics-json-schema=1, pipeline-completion=3, architecture-freshness=2. Hidden test now PASS.

notes: Fix 4 was already applied in v6.9.0-cycle-1 — roadmap carry-over item is resolved. The expected webhook-curl count is 29 (not 21 from the pre-cycle-1 spec) because cycle-1 added 8 new pipeline-paused firing sites.
